'''gawubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khajawah|khajawah]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-w-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khajawah|khajawah]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gawubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæwibith|gæwibith]] || [[word:gæwibij|gæwibij]] || [[word:gæwibish|gæwibish]] || [[word:gæwibi|gæwibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gawuwubuth|gawuwubuth]] || [[word:gawuwubuj|gawuwubuj]] || [[word:gawuwubush|gawuwubush]] || [[word:gawuwubu|gawuwubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gawubuth|gawubuth]] || [[word:gawubuj|gawubuj]] || [[word:gawubush|gawubush]] || [[word:gawubu|gawubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gawufbuth|gawufbuth]] || [[word:gawufbuj|gawufbuj]] || [[word:gawufbush|gawufbush]] || [[word:gawufbuf|gawufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gawubuthu|gawubuthu]] || [[word:gawubuju|gawubuju]] || [[word:gawubushu|gawubushu]] || [[word:gawubuku|gawubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gawubuth|gawubuth]] || [[word:gawubuj|gawubuj]] || [[word:gawubush|gawubush]] || [[word:gawubu|gawubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gawubuthul|gawubuthul]] || [[word:gawubujul|gawubujul]] || [[word:gawubushul|gawubushul]] || [[word:gawubukul|gawubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gawubuthuthu|gawubuthuthu]] || [[word:gawubujuju|gawubujuju]] || [[word:gawubushushu|gawubushushu]] || [[word:gawubuku|gawubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gawubuthun|gawubuthun]] || [[word:gawubujun|gawubujun]] || [[word:gawubushun|gawubushun]] || [[word:gawubukun|gawubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gawubuthuoro|gawubuthuoro]] || [[word:gawubujuoro|gawubujuoro]] || [[word:gawubushuoro|gawubushuoro]] || [[word:gawubukuoro|gawubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
